MYFIRSTCHARACTER-THE_AGENDA.description: #The first card you draw each turn gains *Retain for a turn.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-THE_AGENDA.flavor: If you plan ahead, nothing is impossible.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-THE_AGENDA.title: The Agenda
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-THE_ITINERARY.descripti: #The first card you draw each turn gains *Retain.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-THE_ITINERARY.flavor: If you meticulously plan every moment of your day, and everything is possible
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-THE_ITINERARY.title: The Itinerary
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-NEOWS_BOUNTY.descriptio: #Upon pickup, remove ALL starter cards from your *Deck and gain EVERY [gold]Neow Relic[/gold]. Add a [red]EVIL[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-NEOWS_BOUNTY.title: Neow's Bounty
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-EFFIGY_OF_PHOEBE.descri: #Whenever you play a card via [gold]Ashbound[/gold], gain !B! [gold]Block[/gold].
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-EFFIGY_OF_PHOEBE.flavor: The goddess of intellect and prophecy keeps you safe.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-EFFIGY_OF_PHOEBE.title: Effigy of Phoebe
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-CHERISHED_PLUSHIE.flavo: It's seen better days, but it'll still help you in a pinch.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-CHERISHED_PLUSHIE.title: Cherished Plushie
